title: More Diamonds
description: Adds More Diamonds for your Minecraft!
body:
# Join the official discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/vd9sQSyPCA

More Diamonds is a mod for minecraft that the proposal is very simple: add more diamonds to the game, but the adventure that this mod brings is way larger, making you often have to go mine to collect some diamonds or even exploring some new custom structures and biomes that the mod adds. I am currently making an retexturing update for the mod (spoilers in the image above 👀) and hopefully it will come out in a few weeks! I originally created this mod to make a series on my youtube channel, probably because I was out of ideas for videos, so I thought of posting a series using the mod on my youtube channel (juniperhdbr). Enjoy the mod and have fun!

Note: I will not update the past versions of the mod

**Any questions please contact me on discord: juniperhdbr**![These are the main diamonds that the mod adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b534de834364e86eb9353d96690386f712bc43d6.png)
